name: N.C. Housing Public Company Limited
summary: N.C. Housing Public Company Limited operates as a property development company in Thailand. It develops and sells housing estates and land, single detached houses, duplexes, townhouses, condominiums, and others; provides contractor, construction, and project and property management services; rents space in club houses, etc.; and operates health rehabilitation and senior care centers, etc. The company was founded in 1963 and is headquartered in Pathum Thani, Thailand. N.C. Housing Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of NCH 2555 Holding Company Limited.
